subcodes.first_line: O thou whose conscience is sound and whose heart is compassionate! Praise be unto God, for the garden of divine love is refreshed by the showers from the realms above [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای وجدانت سلیم و قلبت رحیم الحمد لله گلشن محبت الله از ریزش بارش جهان بالا در
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
